/-- The pseudofunctor associativity 2-cocycle of module pullback, at an object: the
two regroupings of a triple composite of pullbacks differ by the congruence cast along
`Category.assoc`. Object-level form of `Scheme.Modules.pseudofunctor_associativity`.
Project-local. -/
lemma pullbackComp_assoc_app {X' Y' Z' T' : Scheme.{u}} (f : X' ÔčÂ Y') (g : Y' ÔčÂ Z')
    (h : Z' ÔčÂ T') (M : T'.Modules) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f (g Ôëź h)).inv.app M Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp g h).inv.app M) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f g).hom.app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback h).obj M) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (f Ôëź g) h).hom.app M
      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (Category.assoc f g h).symm).hom.app M := by
  have e := congrArg (fun ╬▒ => ╬▒.app M)
    (Scheme.Modules.pseudofunctor_associativity (f := f) (g := g) (h := h))
  simp only [NatTrans.comp_app, Functor.whiskerRight_app, Functor.whiskerLeft_app,
    Functor.associator_hom_app, eqToHom_app] at e
  rw [pullbackCongr_hom_app_eqToHom]
  exact e

/-- Solved form of the associativity cocycle at a composite first leg: the regrouping
comparison `((f Ôëź g) Ôëź h)^*` factors through the two inner comparisons and the
associativity cast. Project-local. -/
@[reassoc]
lemma pullbackComp_comp_fst_hom_app {X' Y' Z' T' : Scheme.{u}} (f : X' ÔčÂ Y')
    (g : Y' ÔčÂ Z') (h : Z' ÔčÂ T') (M : T'.Modules) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (f Ôëź g) h).hom.app M
      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f g).inv.app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback h).obj M) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp g h).hom.app M) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f (g Ôëź h)).hom.app M Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (Category.assoc f g h).symm).hom.app M :=
  comp4_solve_last ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f (g Ôëź h)).app M).symm
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).mapIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp g h).app M)).symm
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f g).app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback h).obj M))
    (pullbackComp_assoc_app f g h M)

/-- Solved form of the associativity cocycle for the middle pair: pulling back the
inner regrouping inverse and regrouping the outer pair equals the comparison at the
composite second leg, the associativity cast, and the ungrouping at the composite
first leg. Project-local. -/
@[reassoc]
lemma pullback_map_inv_comp_hom_app {X' Y' Z' T' : Scheme.{u}} (f : X' ÔčÂ Y')
    (g : Y' ÔčÂ Z') (h : Z' ÔčÂ T') (M : T'.Modules) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp g h).inv.app M) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f g).hom.app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback h).obj M)
      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f (g Ôëź h)).hom.app M Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (Category.assoc f g h).symm).hom.app M Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (f Ôëź g) h).inv.app M :=
  ((comp4_solve_mid ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f (g Ôëź h)).app M).symm
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (f Ôëź g) h).app M)
    (pullbackComp_assoc_app f g h M)).trans (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm).trans
    (Category.assoc _ _ _)

/-- Solved form of the associativity cocycle for the front pair: ungrouping at the
composite second leg followed by the pulled-back inner ungrouping equals the

    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp f g).app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback h).obj M))
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (f Ôëź g) h).app M)
    (pullbackComp_assoc_app f g h M)

/-- Generic 5-factor pipeline rearrangement: substitute a middle-pair regrouping, a

private lemma comp5_rearrange {­Łĺ× : Type*} [Category ­Łĺ×]
    {xÔéÇ xÔéü xÔéé xÔéâ xÔéä xÔéů yÔéü yÔéé zÔéü w : ­Łĺ×}
    {dÔéâ : xÔéÇ ÔčÂ xÔéü} {dÔéä : xÔéü ÔčÂ xÔéé} {dÔéů : xÔéé ÔčÂ xÔéâ} {dÔéć : xÔéâ ÔčÂ xÔéä} {dÔéç : xÔéä ÔčÂ xÔéů}

    {cE : yÔéé ÔčÂ w} {f : w ÔčÂ xÔéä}

    dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä Ôëź dÔéů Ôëź dÔéć Ôëź dÔéç = A Ôëź cD Ôëź cC Ôëź cE Ôëź f Ôëź dÔéç := by

/-- **Cast compatibility of the triple-overlap and pair-overlap regroupings** (the
coherence core of the conjugated cocycle): given a pair square `t Ôëź ╬║ = a Ôëź ╬╣`, a
middle bridge `u Ôëź t = ¤ä Ôëź b` and the induced triple square
`¤ä Ôëź (b Ôëź ╬║) = (u Ôëź a) Ôëź ╬╣`, the cast chain through the triple square equals the
pair-square cast chain pulled back along `u`, re-bracketed through the pseudofunctor
associativity. Pure cast coherence ÔÇö no units, counits, or transition isomorphisms.
Project-local. -/
lemma pullback_cast_compat {P A' B' C' E' X' : Scheme.{u}}
    (u : P ÔčÂ A') (a : A' ÔčÂ C') (╬╣ : C' ÔčÂ X') (t : A' ÔčÂ E') (╬║ : E' ÔčÂ X')
    (¤ä : P ÔčÂ B') (b : B' ÔčÂ E')
    (hpair : t Ôëź ╬║ = a Ôëź ╬╣) (hmid : u Ôëź t = ¤ä Ôëź b)
    (htriple : ¤ä Ôëź (b Ôëź ╬║) = (u Ôëź a) Ôëź ╬╣) (W : X'.Modules) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (u Ôëź a) ╬╣).hom.app W Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr htriple).inv.app W Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp ¤ä (b Ôëź ╬║)).inv.app W Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback ¤ä).map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b ╬║).inv.app W)
      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp u a).inv.app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback ╬╣).obj W) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback u).map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp a ╬╣).hom.app W) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback u).map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr hpair).inv.app W) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback u).map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp t ╬║).inv.app W) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp u t).hom.app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback ╬║).obj W) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr hmid).hom.app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback ╬║).obj W) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp ¤ä b).inv.app ((Scheme.Modules.pullback ╬║).obj W) := by
  -- regroup the composite first leg on the left-hand side (`erw`: plain `rw` cannot
  -- match the comp-node pattern under the `X.Modules` instance diamond)
  erw [pullbackComp_comp_fst_hom_app_assoc u a ╬╣ W]
  -- regroup the ¤ä-side trailing pair on the left-hand side
  rw [pullbackComp_inv_comp_map_inv_app ¤ä b ╬║ W]
  -- strip the common two-factor prefix
  refine whisker_eq _ (whisker_eq _ ?_)
  -- the residual three-cast stacks agree under any continuation (all `pullbackCongr`
  -- casts are `eqToHom`s; the fresh `have` is elaborated uniformly, so `simp` fires)
  have hcast : ÔłÇ {Z : P.Modules}
      (zc : (Scheme.Modules.pullback ((¤ä Ôëź b) Ôëź ╬║)).obj W ÔčÂ Z),
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (Category.assoc u a ╬╣).symm).hom.app W Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr htriple).inv.app W Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (Category.assoc ¤ä b ╬║).symm).hom.app W Ôëź zc
        = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr
              (show u Ôëź t Ôëź ╬║ = u Ôëź a Ôëź ╬╣ by rw [hpair])).inv.app W Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (Category.assoc u t ╬║).symm).hom.app W Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr
              (show (u Ôëź t) Ôëź ╬║ = (¤ä Ôëź b) Ôëź ╬║ by rw [hmid])).hom.app W Ôëź zc := by
    intro Z zc
    simp only [pullbackCongr_hom_app_eqToHom, pullbackCongr_inv_app_eqToHom,
      eqToHom_trans_assoc]
  -- right-hand side: regroup the middle pair (t, ╬║), commute the pair congruence past
  -- the regrouping (second argument) and the middle bridge congruence past the
  -- regrouping (first argument) ÔÇö assembled by the abstract-category rearrangement
  -- (the corresponding `rw`s cannot match these comp nodes under the diamond)
  exact (whisker_eq _ (hcast _)).trans
    (comp5_rearrange (pullback_map_inv_comp_hom_app u t ╬║ W)
      (pullback_map_congr_inv_comp_hom_app u hpair W)
      (pullbackComp_inv_comp_congr_hom_app hmid ╬║ W)).symm

/-- Generic 5-factor functor-image fold: a functor image of a collapsed chain. Stated

Project-local. -/

private lemma side_collapse_left {­Łĺ× : Type*} [Category ­Łĺ×]
    {xÔéÇ xÔéü yÔéü yÔéé yÔéâ yÔéä yÔéů aÔéü aÔéé aÔéâ aÔéä aÔéů aÔéć bÔéü mÔéü mÔéé mÔéâ : ­Łĺ×}
    {X : xÔéÇ ÔčÂ xÔéü} {cÔéü : xÔéü ÔčÂ yÔéü} {cÔéé : yÔéü ÔčÂ yÔéé} {cÔéâ : yÔéé ÔčÂ yÔéâ} {w : yÔéâ ÔčÂ yÔéů}
    {cÔéä : yÔéâ ÔčÂ yÔéä} {Y : yÔéä ÔčÂ yÔéů}
    {F1 : xÔéü ÔčÂ aÔéü} {F2 : aÔéü ÔčÂ aÔéé} {F3 : aÔéé ÔčÂ aÔéâ} {F4 : aÔéâ ÔčÂ aÔéä} {F5 : aÔéä ÔčÂ aÔéů}
    {F6 : aÔéů ÔčÂ aÔéć} {F7 : aÔéć ÔčÂ yÔéä}
    {F1' : xÔéÇ ÔčÂ bÔéü} {X' : bÔéü ÔčÂ aÔéü}
    {YÔéü : aÔéć ÔčÂ mÔéü} {F7' : mÔéü ÔčÂ yÔéů} {YÔéé : aÔéů ÔčÂ mÔéé} {F6' : mÔéé ÔčÂ mÔéü}
    {YÔéâ : aÔéä ÔčÂ mÔéâ} {F5' : mÔéâ ÔčÂ mÔéé} {Z : bÔéü ÔčÂ mÔéâ}
    (hw : w = cÔéä Ôëź Y)
    (hcast : cÔéü Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź cÔéâ Ôëź cÔéä = F1 Ôëź F2 Ôëź F3 Ôëź F4 Ôëź F5 Ôëź F6 Ôëź F7)
    (nX : X Ôëź F1 = F1' Ôëź X')
    (nY1 : F7 Ôëź Y = YÔéü Ôëź F7')
    (nY2 : F6 Ôëź YÔéü = YÔéé Ôëź F6')
    (nY3 : F5 Ôëź YÔéé = YÔéâ Ôëź F5')
    (hfold : X' Ôëź F2 Ôëź F3 Ôëź F4 Ôëź YÔéâ = Z) :
    X Ôëź cÔéü Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź cÔéâ Ôëź w = F1' Ôëź Z Ôëź F5' Ôëź F6' Ôëź F7' := by
  rw [hw]
  calc X Ôëź cÔéü Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź cÔéâ Ôëź cÔéä Ôëź Y
      = X Ôëź (cÔéü Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź cÔéâ Ôëź cÔéä) Ôëź Y := by simp only [Category.assoc]
    _ = X Ôëź (F1 Ôëź F2 Ôëź F3 Ôëź F4 Ôëź F5 Ôëź F6 Ôëź F7) Ôëź Y := by rw [hcast]
    _ = X Ôëź F1 Ôëź F2 Ôëź F3 Ôëź F4 Ôëź F5 Ôëź F6 Ôëź F7 Ôëź Y := by simp only [Category.assoc]
    _ = F1' Ôëź X' Ôëź F2 Ôëź F3 Ôëź F4 Ôëź F5 Ôëź F6 Ôëź YÔéü Ôëź F7' := by
        rw [reassoc_of% nX, nY1]
    _ = F1' Ôëź X' Ôëź F2 Ôëź F3 Ôëź F4 Ôëź F5 Ôëź YÔéé Ôëź F6' Ôëź F7' := by rw [reassoc_of% nY2]
    _ = F1' Ôëź X' Ôëź F2 Ôëź F3 Ôëź F4 Ôëź YÔéâ Ôëź F5' Ôëź F6' Ôëź F7' := by rw [reassoc_of% nY3]
    _ = F1' Ôëź (X' Ôëź F2 Ôëź F3 Ôëź F4 Ôëź YÔéâ) Ôëź F5' Ôëź F6' Ôëź F7' := by

/-- **Generic right-side assembly for the conjugated cocycle**: like
`side_collapse_left`, with three extra moves ÔÇö the front comparison splits off a
source-bridge congruence (`hcÔéü`), the pair congruence inside the last factor commutes
out (`hex`), the three middle congruences merge (`hstack`) ÔÇö and a trailing transition
factor `dÔéä` riding along. Pure rebracketing in an abstract category. Project-local. -/
private lemma side_collapse_right {­Łĺ× : Type*} [Category ­Łĺ×]
    {xÔéÇ xÔéü sÔéü sÔéé yÔéü yÔéé yÔéâ zÔéü zÔéé zÔéâ yÔéć eÔéü aÔéü aÔéé aÔéâ aÔéä aÔéů aÔéć bÔéÇ bÔéü mÔéü mÔéé mÔéâ : ­Łĺ×}
    {X : xÔéÇ ÔčÂ xÔéü} {cÔéü : xÔéü ÔčÂ yÔéü} {cÔéé : yÔéü ÔčÂ yÔéé} {cÔéâ : yÔéé ÔčÂ yÔéâ} {w : yÔéâ ÔčÂ yÔéć}
    {dÔéü : yÔéâ ÔčÂ zÔéü} {dÔéé : zÔéü ÔčÂ zÔéé} {dÔéâ : zÔéé ÔčÂ zÔéâ} {dÔéä : zÔéâ ÔčÂ yÔéć}
    {Cs : xÔéü ÔčÂ sÔéü} {cÔéü' : sÔéü ÔčÂ sÔéé} {ceÔéü : sÔéé ÔčÂ yÔéü} {ceÔéé : yÔéé ÔčÂ eÔéü} {cÔéâ' : eÔéü ÔčÂ zÔéü}
    {ctq : sÔéé ÔčÂ eÔéü}
    {G1 : sÔéü ÔčÂ aÔéü} {G2 : aÔéü ÔčÂ aÔéé} {G3 : aÔéé ÔčÂ aÔéâ} {G4 : aÔéâ ÔčÂ aÔéä} {G5 : aÔéä ÔčÂ aÔéů}
    {G6 : aÔéů ÔčÂ aÔéć} {G7 : aÔéć ÔčÂ zÔéé}
    {Cs' : xÔéÇ ÔčÂ bÔéÇ} {XÔéü : bÔéÇ ÔčÂ sÔéü} {G1' : bÔéÇ ÔčÂ bÔéü} {XÔéé : bÔéü ÔčÂ aÔéü}
    {YÔéü : aÔéć ÔčÂ mÔéü} {G7' : mÔéü ÔčÂ zÔéâ} {YÔéé : aÔéů ÔčÂ mÔéé} {G6' : mÔéé ÔčÂ mÔéü}
    {YÔéâ : aÔéä ÔčÂ mÔéâ} {G5' : mÔéâ ÔčÂ mÔéé} {Z : bÔéü ÔčÂ mÔéâ}
    (hw : w = dÔéü Ôëź dÔéé Ôëź dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä)
    (hcÔéü : cÔéü = Cs Ôëź cÔéü' Ôëź ceÔéü)
    (hex : cÔéâ Ôëź dÔéü = ceÔéé Ôëź cÔéâ')
    (hstack : ÔłÇ {Z'} (zc : eÔéü ÔčÂ Z'), ceÔéü Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź ceÔéé Ôëź zc = ctq Ôëź zc)
    (hcast : cÔéü' Ôëź ctq Ôëź cÔéâ' Ôëź dÔéé = G1 Ôëź G2 Ôëź G3 Ôëź G4 Ôëź G5 Ôëź G6 Ôëź G7)
    (nXpre : X Ôëź Cs = Cs' Ôëź XÔéü)
    (nX : XÔéü Ôëź G1 = G1' Ôëź XÔéé)
    (nY1 : G7 Ôëź dÔéâ = YÔéü Ôëź G7')
    (nY2 : G6 Ôëź YÔéü = YÔéé Ôëź G6')
    (nY3 : G5 Ôëź YÔéé = YÔéâ Ôëź G5')
    (hfold : XÔéé Ôëź G2 Ôëź G3 Ôëź G4 Ôëź YÔéâ = Z) :
    X Ôëź cÔéü Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź cÔéâ Ôëź w = Cs' Ôëź G1' Ôëź Z Ôëź G5' Ôëź G6' Ôëź G7' Ôëź dÔéä := by
  rw [hw, hcÔéü]
  calc X Ôëź (Cs Ôëź cÔéü' Ôëź ceÔéü) Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź cÔéâ Ôëź dÔéü Ôëź dÔéé Ôëź dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä
      = X Ôëź Cs Ôëź cÔéü' Ôëź ceÔéü Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź (cÔéâ Ôëź dÔéü) Ôëź dÔéé Ôëź dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä := by
        simp only [Category.assoc]
    _ = X Ôëź Cs Ôëź cÔéü' Ôëź ceÔéü Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź (ceÔéé Ôëź cÔéâ') Ôëź dÔéé Ôëź dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä := by rw [hex]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź XÔéü Ôëź cÔéü' Ôëź ceÔéü Ôëź cÔéé Ôëź ceÔéé Ôëź cÔéâ' Ôëź dÔéé Ôëź dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä := by
        rw [reassoc_of% nXpre]; simp only [Category.assoc]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź XÔéü Ôëź cÔéü' Ôëź ctq Ôëź cÔéâ' Ôëź dÔéé Ôëź dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä := by rw [hstack]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź XÔéü Ôëź (cÔéü' Ôëź ctq Ôëź cÔéâ' Ôëź dÔéé) Ôëź dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä := by simp only [Category.assoc]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź XÔéü Ôëź (G1 Ôëź G2 Ôëź G3 Ôëź G4 Ôëź G5 Ôëź G6 Ôëź G7) Ôëź dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä := by rw [hcast]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź XÔéü Ôëź G1 Ôëź G2 Ôëź G3 Ôëź G4 Ôëź G5 Ôëź G6 Ôëź G7 Ôëź dÔéâ Ôëź dÔéä := by
        simp only [Category.assoc]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź G1' Ôëź XÔéé Ôëź G2 Ôëź G3 Ôëź G4 Ôëź G5 Ôëź G6 Ôëź YÔéü Ôëź G7' Ôëź dÔéä := by
        rw [reassoc_of% nX, reassoc_of% nY1]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź G1' Ôëź XÔéé Ôëź G2 Ôëź G3 Ôëź G4 Ôëź G5 Ôëź YÔéé Ôëź G6' Ôëź G7' Ôëź dÔéä := by
        rw [reassoc_of% nY2]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź G1' Ôëź XÔéé Ôëź G2 Ôëź G3 Ôëź G4 Ôëź YÔéâ Ôëź G5' Ôëź G6' Ôëź G7' Ôëź dÔéä := by
        rw [reassoc_of% nY3]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź G1' Ôëź (XÔéé Ôëź G2 Ôëź G3 Ôëź G4 Ôëź YÔéâ) Ôëź G5' Ôëź G6' Ôëź G7' Ôëź dÔéä := by
        simp only [Category.assoc]
    _ = Cs' Ôëź G1' Ôëź Z Ôëź G5' Ôëź G6' Ôëź G7' Ôëź dÔéä := by rw [hfold]

/-- **Generic final cancellation for the conjugated cocycle**: from the (flattened)

private lemma final_cancel {­Łĺ× : Type*} [Category ­Łĺ×]

  rw [ÔćÉ reassoc_of% h, reassoc_of% hcc, reassoc_of% hbb, haa, Category.comp_id]

end CastCoherence

/-! ### The candidate inverse of the chart restriction morphism

The inverse `¤â_i : M i ÔčÂ ╬╣_i^* (glue ÔÇŽ)` is assembled as an equalizer lift: the chart
pullback preserves the descent equalizer (`glueRestrictEqualizerIso`) and the
pushforward product (`glueRestrictProdIso`), so a map into `╬╣_i^* (glue ÔÇŽ)` is a
family of maps into the factors `╬╣_i^* ((╬╣_j)_* M_j)` equalizing the restricted legs.
The `j`-th component (`glueChartComponent`) transports a section of `M i` to the
overlap: the unit along `f_ij`, the transition isomorphism `g_ij`, then the inverse of
the overlap base change `╬▓_ij` (`glueOverlapBaseChangeIso`, in pullback form
`glueOverlapFactorIso`). The three named obligations consuming the cocycle hypotheses
are `glueChartFamily_equalizes` (C2 transported), `glueChartComponent_self_counit`
(C1 + the counit triangle), and `glueRestrictionHom_glueChartComponent` (the
pair-`(i,j)` equalizer condition transposed). -/

section GlueRestrictionInverse

variable (D : Scheme.GlueData.{0}) (M : ÔłÇ i, (D.U i).Modules)

/-- **Object-level overlap base change in pullback form**: the `╬▓_ij` of
`glueOverlapBaseChangeIso`, evaluated at `M j` and conjugated through
`restrictFunctorIsoPullback` on both sides, identifying
`╬╣_i^* ((╬╣_j)_* M_j) Ôëů (f_ij)_* ((t_ij Ôëź f_ji)^* M_j)` with the geometric pullback
functors. Project-local. -/
noncomputable def glueOverlapFactorIso (i j : D.J) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).obj ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j))
      Ôëů (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).obj
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) :=
  (restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.╬╣ i)).symm.app
      ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j)) Ôë¬Ôëź
    (glueOverlapBaseChangeIso D i j).app (M j) Ôë¬Ôëź
    (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).mapIso
      ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).app (M j))

variable (g : ÔłÇ i j, (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).obj (M i) Ôëů
      (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))

/-- **The `j`-th component of the candidate inverse** `¤â_i`: transport a section of
`M i` to the overlap `V_ij` (the unit of the pullbackÔÇôpushforward adjunction along
`f_ij`), across the transition isomorphism `g_ij`, and back up through the inverse of
the overlap base change `╬▓_ij`. Project-local. -/
noncomputable def glueChartComponent (i j : D.J) :
    M i ÔčÂ (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).obj
      ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j)) :=
  (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).unit.app (M i) Ôëź
    (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).map (g i j).hom Ôëź
    (glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).inv

/-- **The candidate-inverse family into the restricted pushforward product**: the
`glueChartComponent`s assembled through the product-preservation comparison
`glueRestrictProdIso`. Project-local. -/
noncomputable def glueChartFamily (i : D.J) :
    M i ÔčÂ (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).obj (glueProd D M) :=
  Pi.lift (glueChartComponent D M g i) Ôëź (glueRestrictProdIso D M i).inv

/-- **Transpose of the second descent-leg factor** along the composite overlap
immersion `f_pq Ôëź ╬╣_p`: the `bComp`-factor of `glueLegB` (unit along `t_pq Ôëź f_qp`,
`pushforwardComp`, pushforward of `g_pqÔü╗┬╣`, `pushforwardCongr`) transposes to the
pseudofunctor casts, the pullback of the geometric counit, and `g_pqÔü╗┬╣`. Companion of
`glueLegA_component_transpose`, via `homEquiv_comp_pushforwardCongr` and the
transpose naturality in the right argument. Project-local. -/
lemma glueLegB_component_transpose (p q : D.J) :
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f p q Ôëź D.╬╣ p)).homEquiv
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).obj (M q))
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p q)).obj (M p))).symm
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).map
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
              (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p)).unit.app (M q)) Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) (D.╬╣ q)).hom.app
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p)).obj (M q)) Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pushforward
            ((D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) Ôëź D.╬╣ q)).map (g p q).inv Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr
            (show (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) Ôëź D.╬╣ q = D.f p q Ôëź D.╬╣ p by
              rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition p q)).hom.app
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p q)).obj (M p)))
      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr
            (show (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) Ôëź D.╬╣ q = D.f p q Ôëź D.╬╣ p by
              rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition p q)).inv.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).obj (M q)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) (D.╬╣ q)).inv.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).obj (M q)) Ôëź
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ q)).counit.app (M q)) Ôëź
          (g p q).inv) := by
  rw [Equiv.symm_apply_eq]
  have hpq : (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) Ôëź D.╬╣ q = D.f p q Ôëź D.╬╣ p := by
    rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition p q
  -- transpose of the unit pair at `(t_pq Ôëź f_qp, ╬╣_q)`: the counit trick of
  -- `glueLegA_component_transpose`
  have h╬Á : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ q)).homEquiv
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).obj (M q)) (M q)
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ q)).counit.app (M q))
      = ­ŁčÖ ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).obj (M q)) :=
    (Adjunction.homEquiv_unit _ _ _ _).trans
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ q)).right_triangle_components
        (M q))
  have h1 := homEquiv_comp_unit_pushforwardComp (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) (D.╬╣ q)
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ q)).counit.app (M q))
  -- `rw [h╬Á] at h1` cannot match (the counit codomain carries a `­Łčş`-wrapper); term-mode
  replace h1 := (Category.id_comp _).symm.trans ((eq_whisker h╬Á _).symm.trans h1)
  -- re-index along the glue condition
  have h2 := homEquiv_comp_pushforwardCongr hpq
    (W := (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).obj (M q))
    (y := (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) (D.╬╣ q)).inv.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).obj (M q)) Ôëź
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p)).map
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ q)).counit.app (M q)) Ôëź
        (g p q).inv))
  -- absorb `gÔü╗┬╣` into the transpose and fold the unit pair
  have hy : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
        ((D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) Ôëź D.╬╣ q)).homEquiv
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).obj (M q))
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p q)).obj (M p))
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) (D.╬╣ q)).inv.app
            ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).obj (M q)) Ôëź
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p)).map
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ q)).counit.app (M q)) Ôëź
            (g p q).inv))
      = ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ q)).map
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
              (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p)).unit.app (M q)) Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) (D.╬╣ q)).hom.app
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p)).obj (M q))) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward ((D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) Ôëź D.╬╣ q)).map (g p q).inv :=
    (congrArg ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
        ((D.t p q Ôëź D.f q p) Ôëź D.╬╣ q)).homEquiv _ _)
        (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm).trans
      ((Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_right _ _ _).trans (eq_whisker h1.symm _))
  refine Eq.trans ?_ h2
  refine Eq.trans (((Category.assoc _ _ _).trans (Category.assoc _ _ _)).symm) ?_
  exact eq_whisker hy.symm _

/-- **Transpose of the overlap base change** (mate core): the adjoint transpose along
`╬╣_i` of the pullback-form overlap base change `(glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).hom` is
the canonical four-functor comparison of the glue square ÔÇö the unit along
`t_ij Ôëź f_ji` pushed forward along `╬╣_j`, regrouped by `pushforwardComp`, re-indexed
by `pushforwardCongr` along the glue condition, and ungrouped by `pushforwardCompÔü╗┬╣`.
Cocycle-free: this is pure site-level content (every factor is concrete on sections
after the unit/counit bridges). Project-local. -/
lemma glueOverlapFactor_transpose (i j : D.J) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).unit.app
          (M j)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).hom.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr
          (show (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j = D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i by
            rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition i j)).hom.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).inv.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))
    = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).homEquiv
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j))
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).obj
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)))
        ((glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).hom) := by
  have hglue : (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j = D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i := by
    rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition i j
  -- RHS: expand the transpose in unit form; the `leftAdjointUniq` conjugation of the
  -- chart comparison cancels against the unit bridge, leaving the site-level `╬▓`
  have hRHS : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).homEquiv
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j))
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).obj
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)))
        ((glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).hom)
      = (restrictAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).unit.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ i)).map
          ((glueOverlapBaseChangeIso D i j).hom.app (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ i)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).map
            ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).hom.app (M j))) := by
    refine (Adjunction.homEquiv_unit _ _ _ _).trans ?_
    refine Eq.trans (eq_whisker
      (restrictAdjunction_unit_app_iso (D.╬╣ i)
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j))).symm _) ?_
    refine (Category.assoc _ _ _).trans (whisker_eq _ ?_)
    refine ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ i)).map_comp _ _).symm.trans ?_
    refine Eq.trans (congrArg (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ i)).map ?_)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ i)).map_comp _ _)
    exact Iso.hom_inv_id_app_assoc (restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.╬╣ i)) _ _
  rw [hRHS]
  -- LHS: bridge the geometric unit at `t_ij Ôëź f_ji` to the site-level unit; the
  -- emerging `restrictFunctorIsoPullback` factor migrates across the three casts by
  -- naturality (`nÔéü`ÔÇô`nÔéâ`), matching the tail of the right-hand side
  have h_a : (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).unit.app
          (M j))
      = (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
          ((restrictAdjunction (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).unit.app (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).map
            ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).hom.app (M j))) :=
    (congrArg (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
        (restrictAdjunction_unit_app_iso (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (M j)).symm).trans
      ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map_comp _ _)
  have nÔéü := (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).hom.naturality
    ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).hom.app (M j))
  have nÔéé := (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr hglue).hom.naturality
    ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).hom.app (M j))
  have nÔéâ := (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).inv.naturality
    ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).hom.app (M j))
  -- the site-level core: all four factors are concrete on sections; both sides are a
  -- single presheaf restriction along the overlap opens identity
  -- (`glueData_preimage_image_eq`), folded by proof irrelevance as in the closing step
  -- of `glueChartComponent_self_counit`.
  have hcore : (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
        ((restrictAdjunction (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).unit.app (M j)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).hom.app
        ((restrictFunctor (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr hglue).hom.app
        ((restrictFunctor (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).inv.app
        ((restrictFunctor (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))
      = (restrictAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).unit.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ i)).map
          ((glueOverlapBaseChangeIso D i j).hom.app (M j)) := by
    ext O x
    -- every factor is a presheaf restriction of `M j` (the two `pushforwardComp`
    -- factors are identities); fold each side to a single restriction and use
    -- proof irrelevance of the opens morphisms
    have htot : (M j).presheaf.map
          (homOfLE ((D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i).image_preimage_le ((D.╬╣ j) Ôü╗┬╣ßÁü O))).op Ôëź
        (M j).presheaf.map ((D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i).opensFunctor.map
          (eqToHom (show (D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i) Ôü╗┬╣ßÁü O = ((D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j) Ôü╗┬╣ßÁü O by
            rw [hglue]))).op
        = (M j).presheaf.map ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map (D.╬╣ j).base).map
            (homOfLE ((D.╬╣ i).image_preimage_le O))).op Ôëź
          (M j).presheaf.map
            (eqToHom (glueData_preimage_image_eq D i j ((D.╬╣ i) Ôü╗┬╣ßÁü O)).symm).op := by
      rw [ÔćÉ Functor.map_comp, ÔćÉ Functor.map_comp]
      exact congrArg (M j).presheaf.map (Subsingleton.elim _ _)
    exact congr($(htot) x)
  -- restate `h_a` with the composite-functor map (defeq) so `nÔéü` fires syntactically
  have h_a' : (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).unit.app
          (M j))
      = (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
          ((restrictAdjunction (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).unit.app (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) ÔőÖ
          Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
          ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).hom.app (M j)) := h_a
  rw [h_a']
  -- inner chain: migrate the comparison factor through the three casts (`nÔéü`ÔÇô`nÔéâ`);
  -- pure term-mode (positional `simp [Category.assoc]` cannot match the comp nodes
  -- under the `X.Modules` instance diamond)
  have hmove : (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) ÔőÖ
        Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
        ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).hom.app (M j)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).hom.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr hglue).hom.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).inv.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))
      = (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).hom.app
          ((restrictFunctor (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr hglue).hom.app
          ((restrictFunctor (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).inv.app
          ((restrictFunctor (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j) ÔőÖ
          Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ i)).map
          ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).hom.app (M j)) :=
    (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans ((eq_whisker nÔéü _).trans
      ((Category.assoc _ _ _).trans (whisker_eq _
        ((Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans ((eq_whisker nÔéé _).trans
          ((Category.assoc _ _ _).trans (whisker_eq _ nÔéâ)))))))
  refine (Category.assoc _ _ _).trans ((whisker_eq _ hmove).trans ?_)
  refine ((whisker_eq _ ((whisker_eq _ (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm).trans
    (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm)).trans ?_)
  refine (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans ?_
  refine (eq_whisker hcore _).trans ?_
  exact Category.assoc _ _ _

/-- **Mate recognition for the chart-overlap square**: for any `W` on the glued scheme
and `m : W ÔčÂ (╬╣_j)_* (M j)`, transposing `m` along `╬╣_j`, pulling back to the overlap
along `t_ij Ôëź f_ji`, and re-indexing through the pullback-pseudofunctor casts of the
glue square equals the transpose along `f_ij` of `╬╣_i^* m` composed with the overlap
base change in pullback form (`glueOverlapFactorIso`). Universal four-functor
compatibility; reduces by the conjugate calculus to the `m`-free mate core
`glueOverlapFactor_transpose`. Project-local. -/
lemma glueOverlapFactor_mate (i j : D.J) {W : D.glued.Modules}
    (m : W ÔčÂ (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j)) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).hom.app W Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr
        (show (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j = D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i by
          rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition i j)).inv.app W Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).inv.app W Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).map
        (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ j)).homEquiv W (M j)).symm m)
    = ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).homEquiv
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).obj W)
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))).symm
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).map m Ôëź (glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).hom) := by
  have hglue : (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j = D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i := by
    rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition i j
  apply ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).homEquiv
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).obj W)
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))).injective
  refine Eq.trans ?_ (Equiv.apply_symm_apply _ _).symm
  apply ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).homEquiv _ _).injective
  -- right-hand side: peel `m` off by naturality of the transpose
  have hR : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).homEquiv _ _
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).map m Ôëź (glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).hom)
      = m Ôëź (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).homEquiv _ _
          ((glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).hom) :=
    Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_left _ _ _
  -- the conjugate of `pullbackComp.hom` is `pushforwardComp.inv`
  have hcomm := CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv_comm
    (adjÔéü := (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).comp
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)))
    (adjÔéé := Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i))
    (show (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).hom Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).inv = ­ŁčÖ _
      from (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).hom_inv_id)
  rw [Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv] at hcomm
  have hConj : CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i))
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).comp
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)))
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).hom
      = (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).inv :=
    (CategoryTheory.Iso.hom_comp_eq_id _).mp hcomm
  -- transpose of the inner chain along `(t_ij Ôëź f_ji) Ôëź ╬╣_j`: fold the unit pair
  have h1 : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
        ((D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j)).homEquiv W
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).inv.app W Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).map
            (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ j)).homEquiv
              W (M j)).symm m))
      = m Ôëź ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
            (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).unit.app (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).hom.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))) := by
    have h := homEquiv_comp_unit_pushforwardComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)
      (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ j)).homEquiv W (M j)).symm m)
    rw [Equiv.apply_symm_apply] at h
    exact h.symm
  -- re-index along the glue condition
  have h2 := homEquiv_comp_pushforwardCongr hglue
    (W := W)
    (y := (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).inv.app W Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).map
        (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ j)).homEquiv W (M j)).symm m))
  -- the double transpose of the full cast chain
  have hstar := homEquiv_conjugateEquiv_app
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i))
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).comp
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)))
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).hom
    (f := (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr hglue).inv.app W Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).inv.app W Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).map
        (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ j)).homEquiv W (M j)).symm m))
  rw [hConj] at hstar
  -- assemble: LHS double transpose = m Ôëź (four-functor comparison) = m Ôëź transpose ╬▓ = RHS
  refine Eq.trans ?_ hR.symm
  refine Eq.trans (?_ : _ = ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
      (D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i)).homEquiv W _
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr hglue).inv.app W Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).inv.app W Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).map
          (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ j)).homEquiv
            W (M j)).symm m)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).inv.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)))) ?_
  ┬Ě -- the composite-adjunction transpose computes the nested transposes
    refine Eq.trans ?_ hstar
    rw [Adjunction.comp_homEquiv]
    rfl
  ┬Ě -- substitute `h2`, then `h1`, regroup, and finish with the mate core
    rw [ÔćÉ h2]
    exact (eq_whisker (eq_whisker h1 _) _).trans
      ((eq_whisker (Category.assoc _ _ _) _).trans
        ((Category.assoc _ _ _).trans (whisker_eq m
          ((eq_whisker (Category.assoc _ _ _) _).trans
            ((Category.assoc _ _ _).trans ((whisker_eq _ (Category.assoc _ _ _)).trans
              (glueOverlapFactor_transpose D M i j)))))))

/-- **Pair-overlap collapse of the chart component** (the triangle step of the
conjugated cocycle): the chart pullback `f_ij^*` of the `j`-th candidate-inverse
component, fed through the pair cast chain of the glue square and the pulled-back
counit at `╬╣_j`, collapses to the transition isomorphism `g_ij`. The mate
`glueOverlapFactor_mate` at the identity identifies the cast chain with the transpose
of `╬│_ij`, which cancels `╬│_ijÔü╗┬╣` inside the component; the remaining unit/counit pair
at `f_ij` cancels by the left triangle identity. Project-local. -/
lemma glueChartComponent_overlap_collapse (i j : D.J) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).map (glueChartComponent D M g i j) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).hom.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr
          (show (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j = D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i by
            rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition i j)).inv.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).inv.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ j)).counit.app (M j))
      = (g i j).hom := by
  -- transpose of the identity is the counit

          (glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 j) Ôëź (g i j).inv := by
  refine (glueLift_cond_iff D M g
    (fun k => glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 k) i j).mp ?_
  have hfold : ÔłÇ k, (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ k)).homEquiv
        (glue D M g hC1 hC2) (M k) (glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 k)
      = glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 k := fun k => Equiv.apply_symm_apply _ _
  rw [hfold i, hfold j]
  -- the `(i,j)`-component of the equalizer condition of the glued sheaf, extracted by
  -- a pure-unification calc (`glueProj k Ôëí ­ŁčÖ Ôëź equalizer.╬╣ Ôëź ¤Ç_k` definitionally, and
  -- the legs are `Pi.lift`s, so `Pi.lift_¤Ç` folds the components)
  refine Eq.trans ?_ (((eq_whisker (Category.id_comp
    (equalizer.╬╣ (glueLegA D M) (glueLegB D M g) Ôëź
      Pi.¤Ç (fun k => (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ k)).obj (M k)) j)) _).trans
    (Category.assoc _ _ _)).symm)
  calc glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 i Ôëź
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ i)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).unit.app (M i)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).hom.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).obj (M i)))
      = equalizer.╬╣ (glueLegA D M) (glueLegB D M g) Ôëź
        Pi.¤Ç (fun k => (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ k)).obj (M k)) i Ôëź
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ i)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).unit.app (M i)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).hom.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).obj (M i))) :=
        (eq_whisker (Category.id_comp _) _).trans (Category.assoc _ _ _)
    _ = equalizer.╬╣ (glueLegA D M) (glueLegB D M g) Ôëź
        glueLegA D M Ôëź Pi.¤Ç (fun p : D.J ├Ś D.J =>
          (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f p.1 p.2 Ôëź D.╬╣ p.1)).obj
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1))) (i, j) :=
        whisker_eq _ (Limits.Pi.lift_¤Ç (fun p : D.J ├Ś D.J =>
          Pi.¤Ç (fun k => (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ k)).obj (M k)) p.1 Ôëź
            ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ p.1)).map
              ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f p.1 p.2)).unit.app
                (M p.1)) Ôëź
            (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f p.1 p.2) (D.╬╣ p.1)).hom.app
              ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1)))) (i, j)).symm
    _ = (equalizer.╬╣ (glueLegA D M) (glueLegB D M g) Ôëź glueLegA D M) Ôëź
        Pi.¤Ç (fun p : D.J ├Ś D.J =>
          (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f p.1 p.2 Ôëź D.╬╣ p.1)).obj
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1))) (i, j) :=
        (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm
    _ = (equalizer.╬╣ (glueLegA D M) (glueLegB D M g) Ôëź glueLegB D M g) Ôëź
        Pi.¤Ç (fun p : D.J ├Ś D.J =>
          (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f p.1 p.2 Ôëź D.╬╣ p.1)).obj
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1))) (i, j) :=
        eq_whisker (equalizer.condition _ _) _
    _ = equalizer.╬╣ (glueLegA D M) (glueLegB D M g) Ôëź
        glueLegB D M g Ôëź Pi.¤Ç (fun p : D.J ├Ś D.J =>
          (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f p.1 p.2 Ôëź D.╬╣ p.1)).obj
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1))) (i, j) :=
        Category.assoc _ _ _
    _ = equalizer.╬╣ (glueLegA D M) (glueLegB D M g) Ôëź
        Pi.¤Ç (fun k => (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ k)).obj (M k)) j Ôëź
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.╬╣ j)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
            (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).unit.app (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).hom.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward
          ((D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j)).map (g i j).inv Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr
          (show (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j = D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i by
            rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition i j)).hom.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).obj (M i))) :=
        whisker_eq _ (Limits.Pi.lift_¤Ç _ _)

/-- **The restriction morphism followed by a component of the candidate inverse is the
restricted projection** (the pair-`(i,j)` equalizer condition transposed along the
chart immersion). Obligation 3 of `isIso_glueRestrictionHom`. Project-local. -/
lemma glueRestrictionHom_glueChartComponent (i j : D.J) :
    glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i Ôëź glueChartComponent D M g i j
      = (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).map (glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 j) := by
  -- the overlap pullback of `r_i`, transported across `g_ij`, is the mate transpose
  -- of the restricted `j`-th projection
  have hZ : (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).map (glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i) Ôëź
        (g i j).hom
      = ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).homEquiv
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).obj (glue D M g hC1 hC2))
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))).symm
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).map (glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 j) Ôëź
            (glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).hom) := by
    have hc := glueRestriction_overlap_compat D M g hC1 hC2 i j
    have hm := glueOverlapFactor_mate D M i j (glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 j)
    -- unfold the iso-conjugation of `hc`:
    -- `pb(f).map r_i = pbComp.hom.app Ôëź pbCongr.inv.app Ôëź pbComp'.inv.app Ôëź pb(tf).map r_j Ôëź gÔü╗┬╣`
    have hL : (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).map
          (glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i)
        = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).hom.app (glue D M g hC1 hC2) Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr
              (show (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) Ôëź D.╬╣ j = D.f i j Ôëź D.╬╣ i by
                rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition i j)).inv.app
            (glue D M g hC1 hC2) Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (D.╬╣ j)).inv.app
            (glue D M g hC1 hC2) Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).map
            (glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 j) Ôëź (g i j).inv := by
      exact (Iso.inv_comp_eq ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp (D.f i j) (D.╬╣ i)).app
        (glue D M g hC1 hC2))).mp hc
    rw [hL]
    -- generic cancel shape, proved abstractly (simp works on fresh variables; it
    -- cannot match the diamond-laden concrete comp nodes)
    have hcancel : ÔłÇ {P Q R S T U : (D.V (i, j)).Modules}
        (xÔéü : P ÔčÂ Q) (xÔéé : Q ÔčÂ R) (xÔéâ : R ÔčÂ S) (xÔéä : S ÔčÂ T) (e : U Ôëů T),
        (xÔéü Ôëź xÔéé Ôëź xÔéâ Ôëź xÔéä Ôëź e.inv) Ôëź e.hom = xÔéü Ôëź xÔéé Ôëź xÔéâ Ôëź xÔéä := by
      intros; simp
    exact (hcancel _ _ _ _ _).trans hm
  -- the unit naturality square at `r_i`
  have hnat : glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).unit.app (M i)
      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).unit.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).obj (glue D M g hC1 hC2)) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).map
            (glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i)) :=
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).unit.naturality _
  -- the folded transpose equals the restricted projection through the factor iso
  have hY : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f i j)).unit.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).obj (glue D M g hC1 hC2)) Ôëź
      (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).map
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).map
          (glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i) Ôëź (g i j).hom)
      = (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).map (glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 j) Ôëź
        (glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).hom := by
    refine (whisker_eq _ (congrArg
      (fun m => (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).map m) hZ)).trans ?_
    exact (Adjunction.homEquiv_unit _ _ _ _).symm.trans (Equiv.apply_symm_apply _ _)
  -- pure-unification assembly (regroup, naturality, fold, `hY`, cancel the iso)
  exact (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans ((eq_whisker hnat _).trans
    ((Category.assoc _ _ _).trans ((whisker_eq _ ((Category.assoc _ _ _).symm)).trans
      ((whisker_eq _ (eq_whisker
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f i j)).map_comp _ _).symm _)).trans
        ((Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans ((eq_whisker hY _).trans
          ((Category.assoc _ _ _).trans ((whisker_eq _
              (glueOverlapFactorIso D M i j).hom_inv_id).trans
            (Category.comp_id _)))))))))

end GlueRestrictionInverse

/-- **Effective descent: the chart restriction morphism of the glued sheaf is an
isomorphism** (`def:gr_modules_glueRestrictionIso`). This is where the cocycle
hypotheses (C1)/(C2) are consumed.

PROOF ROUTE (scoped iter-066, partially built): the chart pullback `╬╣_i^*` preserves
limits (`pullback_preservesLimits_of_isOpenImmersion` ÔÇö it is isomorphic to the
site-level pushforward `restrictFunctor`), so `╬╣_i^* (glue ÔÇŽ)` is the equalizer of the
restricted legs `╬╣_i^* (glueLegA)`, `╬╣_i^* (glueLegB)` and the restricted product
embeds into `ÔłĆ_j ╬╣_i^* ((╬╣_j)_* M_j)`. The candidate inverse `M i ÔčÂ ╬╣_i^* (glue ÔÇŽ)`
is the equalizer lift of the family whose `j`-component transports a section of `M i`
to the overlap: `unit_{f_ij} Ôëź (f_ij)_* (g_ij-conjugate) Ôëź ╬▓_ijÔü╗┬╣`, where
`╬▓_ij : ╬╣_i^* ((╬╣_j)_* M_j) Ôëů (f_ij)_* ((t_ij Ôëź f_ji)^* M_j)` is the open-cover base
change of the cartesian overlap square (site-level: both composites are pushforwards
along the SAME opens functor, by `glueData_preimage_image_eq`). The equalizing
condition of that family is (C2) in transported form; the two triangle identities
reduce to (C1) and the counit triangle. Remaining work: construct `╬▓_ij` (via
`restrictFunctor` + `SheafOfModules.pushforwardComp`/`pushforwardCongr` +
`glueData_preimage_image_eq`) and verify the three conditions. -/
theorem isIso_glueRestrictionHom (D : Scheme.GlueData.{0}) (M : ÔłÇ i, (D.U i).Modules)
    (g : ÔłÇ i j, (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).obj (M i) Ôëů
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))
    (hC1 : ÔłÇ i, g i i = eqToIso (congrArg (fun ¤ć => (Scheme.Modules.pullback ¤ć).obj (M i))
        (show D.f i i = D.t i i Ôëź D.f i i by rw [D.t_id i, Category.id_comp])))
    (hC2 : ÔłÇ i j k,
        pullbackBaseChangeTransport (pullback.fst (D.f i j) (D.f i k))
            (D.f i j) (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (g i j) Ôë¬Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_mid D i j k)).app (M j) Ôë¬Ôëź
          pullbackBaseChangeTransport (D.t' i j k Ôëź pullback.fst (D.f j k) (D.f j i))
            (D.f j k) (D.t j k Ôëź D.f k j) (g j k) Ôë¬Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_tgt D i j k)).app (M k)
        = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_src D i j k)).app (M i) Ôë¬Ôëź
          pullbackBaseChangeTransport (pullback.snd (D.f i j) (D.f i k))
            (D.f i k) (D.t i k Ôëź D.f k i) (g i k)) (i : D.J) :
    IsIso (glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i) := by
  -- the restriction morphism in unitÔÇôcounit form
  have hr : glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i
      = (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).map (glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 i) Ôëź
        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.╬╣ i)).counit.app (M i) :=
    Adjunction.homEquiv_counit _ _ _ _
  refine ÔčĘglueRestrictionInv D M g hC1 hC2 i, ?_, ?_Ôčę
  ┬Ě -- `r_i Ôëź ¤â_i = ­ŁčÖ`: joint detection by the restricted projections; the `j`-th
    -- component is the transposed pair-`(i,j)` equalizer condition (obligation 3)
    apply glueRestrict_hom_ext D M g hC1 hC2
    intro j
    rw [Category.assoc, glueRestrictionInv_pullback_map_glueProj,
      glueRestrictionHom_glueChartComponent]
    exact (Category.id_comp _).symm
  ┬Ě -- `¤â_i Ôëź r_i = ­ŁčÖ`: the self-component collapses by (C1) + the counit triangle
    -- (obligation 2)
    -- term-mode regrouping (mixed-provenance comp nodes block positional `rw`)
    exact (whisker_eq _ hr).trans ((Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans
      ((eq_whisker (glueRestrictionInv_pullback_map_glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 i i) _).trans
        (glueChartComponent_self_counit D M g hC1 i)))

/-- **The restriction isomorphism of the glued sheaf**

noncomputable def glueRestrictionIso (D : Scheme.GlueData.{0}) (M : ÔłÇ i, (D.U i).Modules)
    (g : ÔłÇ i j, (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).obj (M i) Ôëů
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i)).obj (M j))
    (hC1 : ÔłÇ i, g i i = eqToIso (congrArg (fun ¤ć => (Scheme.Modules.pullback ¤ć).obj (M i))
        (show D.f i i = D.t i i Ôëź D.f i i by rw [D.t_id i, Category.id_comp])))
    (hC2 : ÔłÇ i j k,
        pullbackBaseChangeTransport (pullback.fst (D.f i j) (D.f i k))
            (D.f i j) (D.t i j Ôëź D.f j i) (g i j) Ôë¬Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_mid D i j k)).app (M j) Ôë¬Ôëź
          pullbackBaseChangeTransport (D.t' i j k Ôëź pullback.fst (D.f j k) (D.f j i))
            (D.f j k) (D.t j k Ôëź D.f k j) (g j k) Ôë¬Ôëź
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_tgt D i j k)).app (M k)
        = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_src D i j k)).app (M i) Ôë¬Ôëź
          pullbackBaseChangeTransport (pullback.snd (D.f i j) (D.f i k))
            (D.f i k) (D.t i k Ôëź D.f k i) (g i k)) (i : D.J) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.╬╣ i)).obj (glue D M g hC1 hC2) Ôëů M i :=
  haveI := isIso_glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i
  asIso (glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i)
